entity.summary: Order-book decentralized exchange for spot and perpetuals trading launched on the Blast L2 network in March 2024 as the first cross-chain instance of Vertex Edge. Current exchange trackers report no active trading pairs, volume, or open interest, so HEI classifies it as inactive rather than dead.
entity.notes: The backlog candidate name 'Blitz AMM' was inaccurate: first-party materials describe an order-book DEX, not an AMM. The March 12 marker follows reporting on the rollout of the first Vertex Edge cross-chain instance. Zero current market activity supports inactive status, but no official shutdown notice was recovered.

events.title: Blitz launched on Blast through Vertex Edge
events.description: Vertex rolled out Blitz as the first cross-chain instance of Vertex Edge, providing order-book spot and perpetuals trading on the Blast L2 network.
events.notes: First-party material published before launch described the product and near-term mainnet rollout; independent launch-day reporting records the March 12 rollout.

evidence.title: Blitz on Blast — Unleashing Synchronous DEX Liquidity
evidence.notes: First-party description identifies Blitz as an order-book DEX for spot and perpetuals and the first cross-chain instance of Vertex Edge.

evidence.title: Vertex Protocol launches Vertex Edge and first Blitz instance
evidence.notes: Launch-day report states that the Vertex Edge debut coincided with the rollout of Blitz on Blast.

evidence.title: Blitz exchange statistics
evidence.notes: Current profile reports zero trading pairs, zero reported volume, and zero open interest while preserving the Blitz exchange identity and website.
